name: Get a book from Subcategory List View and Return from Subcategory List View (ANDROID)
fullName: Books transactions in Palace Bookshelf: Get a book from Subcategory List View and Return from Subcategory List View (ANDROID)

steps.name: When  I add "Palace Bookshelf" account from welcomeScreen
And  I search for 'Flower Fables' and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
When  Click GET action button on EBOOK book with 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click RETURN action button on EBOOK book with 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
Then  EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on catalog books screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Get a book from Subcategory List View and Return from Subcategory List View (ANDROID)

labels.value: Get a book from Subcategory List View and Return from Subcategory List View (ANDROID)
